lab.notes: Auto Color Library swatch sample (https://www.autocolorlibrary.com/pages/1986-Hyundai.html). Image data/sources/autocolorlibrary/pages/1986-hyundai/1986-Hyundai-pg03.jpg; bbox 146,209 150×210. Online chip; replace with spectro LAB before production claims. Tesseract batch: code conf≈51; verify chip alignment.

Auto Color Library swatch sample (https://www.autocolorlibrary.com/pages/2019-Hyundai.html). Image data/sources/autocolorlibrary/pages/2019-hyundai/2019_Hyundai_02.jpg; bbox 1327,2811 150×210. Online chip; replace with spectro LAB before production claims. Tesseract batch: code conf≈95; verify chip alignment.

Auto Color Library swatch sample (https://www.autocolorlibrary.com/pages/2018-Hyundai.html). Image data/sources/autocolorlibrary/pages/2018-hyundai/2018-Hyundai-pg03.jpg; bbox 1553,3137 150×210.
